message:
test(demo-showcase): expand accessibility tests and add storm benchmarks

Accessibility test improvements:
- Expand advanced_text_editor_ux_a11y.rs with more comprehensive tests
- Add screen reader compatibility validation
- Test keyboard navigation patterns for a11y compliance
- Add focus management verification

New test files:
- a11y_snapshots.rs: snapshot tests for accessibility state verification
- resize_storm_bench.rs: stress test for rapid resize scenarios
  measuring coalescer effectiveness under load

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
